use_cases: Displaying key performance metrics and analytics data in a dashboard layout
Showing progress indicators with circular visualizations for goal tracking
Providing tabbed content switching for different data views
Interactive 3D card effect for enhanced visual engagement on hover
Dark mode toggle for user preference customization
ai_summary: A professional analytics dashboard card with 3D tilt parallax effects responding to mouse movement. Features tabbed content switching, circular progress indicators, and dark/light mode toggle. Displays metric data with a clean, minimalist aesthetic suitable for SaaS and fintech applications.
